wheat.advice: Spray Propiconazole 25% EC @ 1ml/litre water immediately. Remove and destroy infected leaves. Avoid excess nitrogen fertilizer. Repeat spray after 15 days if symptoms persist.
wheat.advice_hi: Propiconazole 25% EC ka 1ml/litre pani mein turant chidkav karein. Sankramit pattiyon ko hata kar nasht karein. Zyada nitrogen khaad se bachein. 15 din baad zaroorat pade to dobara chidkav karein.

wheat.advice: Treat seeds with Carboxin or Tebuconazole before next sowing. Remove infected ears before they release spores. No cure once visible; focus on prevention next season.
wheat.advice_hi: Agli buwai se pehle beejon ko Carboxin ya Tebuconazole se upchar karein. Beejaanu failne se pehle sankramit balियों ko hata dein.

tomato.disease: Tomato Leaf Curl Virus (transmitted by whitefly)
tomato.advice: Control whitefly population using yellow sticky traps and Imidacloprid spray. Remove and burn infected plants to stop spread. Use virus-resistant varieties next season.
tomato.advice_hi: Yellow sticky traps aur Imidacloprid chidkav se safed makkhi ko niyantrit karein. Sankramit paudhon ko hata kar jala dein.

tomato.advice: Apply Mancozeb 75% WP @ 2g/litre water every 7-10 days. Ensure proper spacing for air circulation. Avoid overhead irrigation.
tomato.advice_hi: Mancozeb 75% WP ka 2g/litre pani mein har 7-10 din mein chidkav karein. Paudhon ke beech uchit doori rakhein.

cotton.advice: Install pheromone traps (5/acre) for monitoring. Spray Profenofos 50% EC if infestation exceeds threshold. Destroy crop residue after harvest to break the pest cycle.
cotton.advice_hi: Pheromone traps (5/acre) lagayein. Sankraman zyada hone par Profenofos 50% EC chidkav karein. Fasal katai ke baad avshesh nasht karein.

rice.advice: Spray Tricyclazole 75% WP @ 0.6g/litre at first sign. Maintain balanced nitrogen application - avoid excess. Ensure good field drainage.
rice.advice_hi: Pehle lakshan dikhte hi Tricyclazole 75% WP @ 0.6g/litre chidkav karein. Nitrogen ka santulit upyog karein.
